Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

Class JMLTransformer

java.lang.Object
recoder.kit.Transformation
recoder.kit.TwoPassTransformation
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.RecoderModelTransformer
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.JMLTransformer
public final class JMLTransformer extends RecoderModelTransformer
RecodeR transformation that parses JML comments, and attaches code-like specifications (ghost fields, set statements, model methods) directly to the RecodeR AST. Note that internally, this class is highly similar to the class speclang.jml.SpecExtractor; if you change one of these classes, you probably need to change the other as well.

  • Field Details

    • javaMods

      public static final ImmutableList<JMLModifier> javaMods

  • Constructor Details

    • JMLTransformer

      public JMLTransformer(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration services, RecoderModelTransformer.TransformerCache cache)
      Creates a transformation that adds JML specific elements, for example ghost fields and model method declarations.
      Parameters:
      services - the CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration to access model information
      cache - a cache object that stores information which is needed by and common to many transformations. it includes the compilation units, the declared classes, and information for local classes.

  • Method Details

    • getFullText

      public static String getFullText(ParserRuleContext context)

    • makeExplicit

      protected void makeExplicit(TypeDeclaration td)
      Description copied from class: RecoderModelTransformer
      The method is called for each type declaration of the compilation unit and initiates the syntactical transformation. If you want to descend in inner classes you have to implement the recursion by yourself.
      Specified by:
      makeExplicit in class RecoderModelTransformer

    • analyze

      public ProblemReport analyze()
      Description copied from class: TwoPassTransformation
      Prepares all necessary information for the syntactic transformation and checks the transformation requirements. This method may call any queries but may not change the model directly (the model might be augmented by automatic reload, however). This default implementation sets and returns Transformation.NO_PROBLEM.
      Overrides:
      analyze in class TwoPassTransformation
      Returns:
      a problem report, an instance of NoProblemif all requirements have been met.

    • makeExplicit

      public void makeExplicit()
      Description copied from class: RecoderModelTransformer
      invokes model transformation for each top level type declaration in any compilation unit. Not for inner classes.
      Overrides:
      makeExplicit in class RecoderModelTransformer
